def merge_updates(base_config, overrides):
    result = {}
    for key, value in base_config.items():
        result[key] = value
    for key, value in overrides.items():
        result[key] = value
    return result


def sync_user_preferences(defaults, user_prefs, session_overrides):
    merged = {}
    for key, val in defaults.items():
        merged[key] = val
    for key, val in user_prefs.items():
        merged[key] = val
    for key, val in session_overrides.items():
        merged[key] = val
    return merged
